title: vitex negundo var. simplicifolia
intro: Vitex negundo var. simplicifolia, also known as the Chinese chaste tree or Five-leaved chaste tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting menopausal symptoms. Vitex negundo var. simplicifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
